title: default keyword does not apply recursively to subarrays in an array assignment expression

features.name: multi-dimensional unpacked array with recursive default
features.description: Code should include a multi-dimensional unpacked array assignment using the default keyword recursively for subarrays

features.name: nested default keywords in multi-dimensional array assignment
features.description: Code should include nested default keywords in a multi-dimensional unpacked array assignment pattern as a workaround
